prompt: A vibrant anime-style DJ girl in a cute, dreamy rave aesthetic, centered in a close-up upper-body composition behind a professional DJ controller. She wears oversized rainbow bunny ears on a headband and large rainbow over-ear headphones, with one hand pressing the right headphone cup and the other hand touching the left turntable as if cueing the next track. Use a slightly low-angle viewpoint looking up at her to create an energetic, emotional performance mood. Give her a short straight bob haircut with blunt bangs in pastel blonde with rainbow-tinted ends. Her face should show a playful DJ expression: one eye winking and a wide mischievous grin, as if she is about to drop the beat. Dress her in a white hoodie with rainbow-striped cuffs and two small red heart patches on the chest and sleeve. The DJ setup should include exactly 2 turntables, 1 central mixer section, 4 vertical channel faders, 3 EQ knob rows, and 2 small display screens with glowing waveform-like graphics. Fill the background with a soft lavender-to-pink gradient, tiny sparkles, floating pastel hearts, and exactly 6 colorful music-note icons scattered around the character. Render it in polished, glossy, high-detail anime illustration style with luminous rainbow lighting, soft shading, clean line art, saturated colors, cute idol-meets-club energy, and an extra emotive, magical, “emo” atmosphere.
